mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM pt_coach_comment WHERE appointment_id = #{appointmentId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pt_coach_comment (appointment_id, coach_id, member_id, member_nickname, member_mobile, score, comment_content, comment_time) VALUES (#{appointmentId}, #{coachId}, #{memberId}, #{memberNickname}, #{memberMobile}, #{score}, #{commentContent}, NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.appointment_id AS appointmentId, c.coach_id AS coachId, co.coach_name AS coachName, c.score AS score, c.comment_content AS commentContent, c.reply_status AS replyStatus, c.handle_status AS handleStatus, DATE_FORMAT(c.comment_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS commentTime, s.storeName AS storeName, DATE_FORMAT(a.appointment_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS appointmentDate, DATE_FORMAT(a.start_time, '%H:%i') AS startTime, DATE_FORMAT(a.end_time, '%H:%i') AS endTime, r.reply_content AS replyContent, DATE_FORMAT(r.reply_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS replyTime FROM pt_coach_comment c LEFT JOIN pt_private_appointment a ON a.id = c.appointment_id LEFT JOIN pt_coach co ON co.id = c.coach_id LEFT JOIN store s ON s.storeId = a.store_id LEFT JOIN pt_coach_comment_reply r ON r.id = ( SELECT r2.id FROM pt_coach_comment_reply r2 WHERE r2.comment_id = c.id ORDER BY r2.reply_time DESC, r2.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE c.member_id = #{userId} AND c.deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.comment_time DESC, c.id DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pt_coach_comment c WHERE c.member_id = #{userId} AND c.deleted = 0
